About
♩ Choir
Conductor
WEB EDITION
A tool for choir conductors to manage setlists, set the pitch for each song, and keep the beat. Tap the rhythm box to practice your time signature. Use the piano to set starting notes for your singers.
Converted from Corona SDK (Lua) to Web
